ddls:
CREATE TABLE "learning_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning resource */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL link to the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "publication_day" TEXT /* Day of the week the resource was published */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the resource belongs to */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content provider */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the resource (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Estimated time required to complete the resource */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the resource */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the resource based on user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_resources_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., learner, instructor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user working on the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being tracked */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was completed */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the resource completed by the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user started the resource */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last access to the resource */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made by the user during the learning process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES learning_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "is_current_version" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the current version of the resource */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES learning_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES learning_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES learning_resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
